opinion.h4: FORD v. UNITED STATES. CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SECOND CIRCUIT. No. 82. Decided November 12, 1957.
opinion.p: Upon suggestion of mootness, judgment vacated and case remanded to the District Court with directions to vacate the judgment of conviction and dismiss the indictment.
Solicitor General Rankin for the United States.

Upon the suggestion of mootness the judgment of the United States Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit is vacated and the case is remanded to the United States District Court with directions to vacate the judgment of conviction and to dismiss the indictment.
